name: TensorPM v1.8.9-beta.2 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.8.9-beta.2

## Bug Fixes

### GitHub Copilot sub-agent now works in production builds

The `github_copilot` tool failed in installed builds with "CLI server exited
unexpectedly with code 0".

**What Changed:**

- The Copilot SDK was spawning its CLI launcher via the app executable itself,
  which started a second TensorPM instance that immediately quit on the
  single-instance lock
- TensorPM now resolves the Copilot CLI explicitly and passes its path to the
  SDK, so the real CLI is spawned

**User Benefit:**
Asking the TensorPM agent about GitHub issues, PRs, commits, or code works
again in the installed app.

## Improvements

### Significantly smaller app — Copilot CLI no longer bundled

**What Changed:**

- The GitHub Copilot CLI (~250 MB) is no longer shipped inside the app; only
  the lightweight SDK (<1 MB) remains
- TensorPM now uses the Copilot CLI installed on your system (npm global
  install or the VS Code Copilot Chat CLI) and detects it automatically
- CLI detection now verifies the exact binary that will be used and reports a
  clear install hint (`npm install -g @github/copilot`) when none is found

**User Benefit:**
Downloads and updates are roughly 30% smaller. If you use GitHub Copilot, keep
your Copilot CLI installed and signed in — TensorPM picks it up automatically.

## Notes

- The GitHub Copilot integration requires the standalone Copilot CLI and an
  active GitHub Copilot subscription. Without it, the tool is simply hidden.

---

## Release Info

- **Version**: 1.8.9-beta.2
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-08
- **Previous Version**: 1.8.9-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch (Beta) Release
